findings.title: Outdated Flask with known security issues
findings.description: Flask 2.0.1 pinned in requirements.txt has known security vulnerabilities patched in later versions

findings.title: PyYAML with FullLoader deserialization risk
findings.description: PyYAML 5.3.1 with FullLoader usage allows some Python object construction and has known CVEs

findings.title: Outdated requests library with known vulnerabilities
findings.description: requests 2.25.1 has CVE-2023-32681 allowing Proxy-Authorization header leakage on redirects

findings.title: Outdated lxml with XXE and memory corruption risks
findings.description: lxml 4.6.3 bundles vulnerable libxml2 with known memory corruption and XXE issues

findings.title: Outdated cryptography library
findings.description: cryptography 3.3.2 has multiple known vulnerabilities in OpenSSL bindings
